description: Shared OODA runtime request contract used by launcher-style orchestration surfaces.

task.description: Task passed to the OODA runtime.

task_id.description: Stable task id for runtime tracking.

instruction.description: Canonical instruction field for OODA runtime requests.

instructions.description: Compatibility alias retained until all consumers converge on instruction.

context.description: Context object supplied to the OODA runtime from launcher-like surfaces.

graph_summary.description: Folded or direct graph summary supplied to the OODA runtime.

grounding_directive.description: Grounding constraints applied to the runtime call.
